repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories capture TilingFunc compilation errors where the TilingData class lacks the members or setter methods being used. id=84bb2c98 (ca6k_00188) directly addresses 'has no member named set_*', similar to the current 'no member named totalPixels' pattern. id=893b2208 (argmax_over_a_dimension) covers a 'missing or misplaced tiling data field' error at the same opbuild stage. id=a7e19946 (ca6k_00246) and id=1cb26d2c (ca6k_00262) both involve missing setter methods or direct members (set_N, set_totalLength) in TilingFunc, mirroring the current direct-member-assignment error. id=e851b331 (ca6k_00288) similarly handles setter-based TilingData missing fields. Together they provide diverse, complementary hints for resolving the ca6k_00113 TilingData member absence.
